calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing And Application For Entry Of Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Aug-22-2017 Granted
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon CSR#6840.
Brian H. Gunn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff CitiBank N.A.,
Plaintiff's witness Darlene Neel was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Miranda S. Devlin fka Miranda S. Agpaoa.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintif and against the Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages in total amount of $104,901.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
